subject: LV-RUN-1 — Update SHARED/skills/README.md with W1.5 ACTIVE status note
body:
Per parent task LANE01-W1-LOOP-VALIDATION-V1 (V1.1 W1.6) Run 1: update `docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/skills/README.md` with a small note reflecting that 4 tech non-canon skills are now ACTIVE v1.0 post LANE01-W1-CORE-SKILLS-ACTIVATE-V1 (V1.1 W1.5). This is the smallest-scope baseline run for the 5-step loop coverage check.

Deliverables:
1. Edit `docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/skills/README.md` — add 1 short paragraph after the Bootstrap status line noting 4 skills now ACTIVE v1.0 + REGISTRY.md v1.2 + canon-guard remains DRAFT pending W1.7.
2. Single commit + push.

Rollback: git revert the doc-update commit.
requested_action: Lane_01 (CLAC-1) executor opens the README, adds the W1.5 status paragraph, commits with [vercel skip], pushes; then aier-state-update + aier-verify invoked to close the loop.
acceptance_criteria: README contains a paragraph reflecting 4 skills ACTIVE v1.0 post W1.5
HEAD matches origin/main; worktree clean post-push
No SKILL.md or METADATA.yaml of any skill modified (boundary: invoke only)
